description:
The Accounts Receivable team at GardenWorld needs a formal dunning (collections) plan to chase overdue customer payments. Create a dunning plan named 'Standard Collections' (Description: 'Three-level dunning plan for overdue AR invoices') with 'Create levels sequentially' enabled. The plan must include three escalating levels with the following specifications:

Level 1: Name 'Friendly Reminder', Print Text 'Friendly Reminder', 30 days after due, 0 days between dunning, 0 charge fee, Show All Due enabled, and Show Not Due disabled.

Level 2: Name 'Urgent Notice', Print Text 'Urgent Notice', 60 days after due, 30 days between dunning, 25.00 charge fee, Show All Due enabled, and Show Not Due disabled.

Level 3: Name 'Final Demand', Print Text 'Final Demand', 90 days after due, 30 days between dunning, 50.00 charge fee, 1.5 interest percent, Show All Due enabled, and Show Not Due disabled.
